productDisplayName: Nike Women Butterfly Thong Green Flip Flops
description: One look at these flip flops and your feet are bound to sigh with the pleasure of relaxation. The nike Butterfly Thong slippers are designed keeping in mind absolute cushioned comfort to relax your feet and offer a comfortable ride. Upper Synthetic leather thong straps with a toe separator and a padded fabric inner lining to lock the foot in place Embroidered nike swoosh logo on the lateral strap Cushioned phylon footbed in with butterfly print for all-day comfort and style Outsole TPR outsole with herringbone grooves for absolute grip and tractionshoe care Remove dust and dirt with damp, clean cloth Do not store in direct sunlight
